name: @pingpolls/svelte-adapter-bun-isr
description: SvelteKit adapter for Bun with Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) support

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun --minify && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: bun run build && bun test && bunx --bun npm publish --access public
